description: Gain attack speed while continuously attacking. Resets if the unit idles too long.
tooltipTemplate: Each consecutive attack grants +{bonusPerAttack%} attack speed (max +{maxBonus%}). Resets after {resetAfterSeconds:1}s without attacking.

description: Every 3rd attack deals a bonus hit for increased damage.
tooltipTemplate: Every {everyNthAttack}rd attack fires a bonus hit dealing {bonusMultiplier+%} damage.

description: Attack speed increases as HP decreases. Full bonus at near-death.
tooltipTemplate: Attack speed scales from 0 to +{maxBonus%} as HP drops from full to 0.

description: Each attack also hits the nearest additional enemy within the cleave radius.
tooltipTemplate: Each attack also strikes the nearest enemy within {splashRadius} units.

description: Killing an enemy grants a short attack speed burst.
